'''âp-z-s''' ('''kapazas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:majorize|majorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:majorize|majorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-z-s
|-
! Lemma
| kapazas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipazas|thipazas]] || [[word:jipazas|jipazas]] || [[word:shipazas|shipazas]] || [[word:kipazas|kipazas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupazas|thuthupazas]] || [[word:jujupazas|jujupazas]] || [[word:shushupazas|shushupazas]] || [[word:kukupazas|kukupazas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupazas|thupazas]] || [[word:jupazas|jupazas]] || [[word:shupazas|shupazas]] || [[word:kupazas|kupazas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupazas|thupazas]] || [[word:jupazas|jupazas]] || [[word:shupazas|shupazas]] || [[word:kupazas|kupazas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepazas|thepazas]] || [[word:jepazas|jepazas]] || [[word:shepazas|shepazas]] || [[word:kepazas|kepazas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopazas|thothopazas]] || [[word:jojopazas|jojopazas]] || [[word:shoshopazas|shoshopazas]] || [[word:kokopazas|kokopazas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopazas|thopazas]] || [[word:jopazas|jopazas]] || [[word:shopazas|shopazas]] || [[word:kopazas|kopazas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopazas|thopazas]] || [[word:jopazas|jopazas]] || [[word:shopazas|shopazas]] || [[word:kopazas|kopazas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpazas|thĂŠpazas]] || [[word:jĂŠpazas|jĂŠpazas]] || [[word:shĂŠpazas|shĂŠpazas]] || [[word:kĂŠpazas|kĂŠpazas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapazas|thathapazas]] || [[word:jajapazas|jajapazas]] || [[word:shashapazas|shashapazas]] || [[word:kakapazas|kakapazas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapazas|thapazas]] || [[word:japazas|japazas]] || [[word:shapazas|shapazas]] || [[word:kapazas|kapazas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapazas|thapazas]] || [[word:japazas|japazas]] || [[word:shapazas|shapazas]] || [[word:kapazas|kapazas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapazas|shapazas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapazas|goshapazas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapazas|gokishapazas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapazasnĂŒ|shapazasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapazasnknĂŒ|goshapazasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazasnĂŒ|gokishapazasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapazashĂ«|shapazashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapazasnkshĂ«|goshapazasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapazashĂ«|gokishapazashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazasro|shapazasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazasnkro|goshapazasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazasro|gokishapazasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazasmu|shapazasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazasnkmu|goshapazasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazasmu|gokishapazasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapazasher|shapazasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapazasnksher|goshapazasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapazasher|gokishapazasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapazasng|shapazasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapazasnkng|goshapazasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapazasng|gokishapazasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapazasya|shapazasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapazasnkya|goshapazasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapazasya|gokishapazasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapazasyam|shapazasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapazasnkyam|goshapazasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapazasyam|gokishapazasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazasnĂŒshĂ«|shapazasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapazasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapazasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazasnĂŒro|shapazasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazasnknĂŒro|goshapazasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazasnĂŒro|gokishapazasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazasnĂŒmu|shapazasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazasnknĂŒmu|goshapazasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazasnĂŒmu|gokishapazasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazashĂ«nĂŒ|shapazashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapazasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapazashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazashĂ«ro|shapazashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazasnkshĂ«ro|goshapazasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazashĂ«ro|gokishapazashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazashĂ«mu|shapazashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazasnkshĂ«mu|goshapazasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazashĂ«mu|gokishapazashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazasronĂŒ|shapazasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazasnkronĂŒ|goshapazasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazasronĂŒ|gokishapazasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazasroshĂ«|shapazasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazasnkroshĂ«|goshapazasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazasroshĂ«|gokishapazasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazasromu|shapazasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazasnkromu|goshapazasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazasromu|gokishapazasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazasmunĂŒ|shapazasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazasnkmunĂŒ|goshapazasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazasmunĂŒ|gokishapazasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazasmushĂ«|shapazasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazasnkmushĂ«|goshapazasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazasmushĂ«|gokishapazasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazasmuro|shapazasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazasnkmuro|goshapazasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazasmuro|gokishapazasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
